title: Purple Sky Inventory
description: Nice Purple Sky in your inventory without needing any mods.
body:
# Purple Sky Inventory

Give your Minecraft interface a calm and aesthetic upgrade with this purple sky–themed inventory GUI. Designed with soft gradients, clouds, and a clean grid layout, this texture pack transforms the default inventory into something more visually appealing without affecting usability.


## ✨ Features:

- Custom purple sky background with smooth cloud visuals

- Clean, minimal slot design for better visibility

- Balanced contrast so items remain easy to see

- Works seamlessly with standard Minecraft UI scaling


## 🎨 Style:
A relaxing dusk-inspired theme that blends soft purples, pinks, and subtle highlights—perfect for players who prefer a modern and aesthetic interface.


## ⚙️ Compatibility:

Should work with most vanilla-based/Modded setups and modpacks.

## ⚠️ Important:

- The recepie book icon is adjusted to show on hover, to enhance the look of ths resource pack.
- To access the recepie book icon you can simply take you cursor to where the recepie icon is usually present then you will be able to see it.
